channel.title: GitHub AI Ranking Changes (Top 10)
channel.description: Track changes in GitHub AI repository rankings (Top 10 per category)

item.title: [LLM] open-webui
item.description:
📉 Rank: #7 → #8 (↓1)
User-friendly AI Interface (Supports Ollama, OpenAI API, ...)
Language: Python
Category: LLM Stars: 129,590 | Forks: 18,352

item.title: [LLM] everything-claude-code
item.description:
📈 Rank: #8 → #7 (↑1) | ⭐ Stars: 128,159 → 131,701 (+3,542)
The agent harness performance optimization system. Skills, instincts, memory, security, and research-first development for Claude Code, Codex, Opencode, Cursor and beyond.
Language: JavaScript
Category: LLM Stars: 131,701 | Forks: 18,928

item.title: [Claude] claude-code
item.description:
⭐ Stars: 94,017 → 102,621 (+8,604)
Claude Code is an agentic coding tool that lives in your terminal, understands your codebase, and helps you code faster by executing routine tasks, explaining complex code, and handling git workflows - all through natural language commands.
Language: Shell
Category: Claude Stars: 102,621 | Forks: 16,095

item.title: [Claude] everything-claude-code

item.title: [Claude] ui-ux-pro-max-skill

item.title: [Claude] gstack
item.description:
📈 Rank: #9 → #8 (↑1) | ⭐ Stars: 59,877 → 61,131 (+1,254)
Use Garry Tan's exact Claude Code setup: 23 opinionated tools that serve as CEO, Designer, Eng Manager, Release Manager, Doc Engineer, and QA
Language: TypeScript
Category: Claude Stars: 61,131 | Forks: 8,082

item.title: [Claude] lobehub
item.description:
📈 Rank: #8 → #7 (↑1)
The ultimate space for work and life — to find, build, and collaborate with agent teammates that grow with you. We are taking agent harness to the next level — enabling multi-agent collaboration, effortless agent team design, and introducing agents as the unit of work interaction.
Language: TypeScript
Category: Claude Stars: 74,633 | Forks: 14,845

item.title: [Claude] awesome-claude-skills
item.description:

item.title: [AI] openclaw
item.description:
